response.justification: The candidate lacks sufficient depth in C++ and relevant industry experience for the Senior Manager — Digital Solutions (C++ Developer) role. While they have C/C++ experience from early roles (National Instruments, 2014–2015), their recent work (8+ years) has been primarily in Node.js, TypeScript, D, Java, and Python, with no demonstrated focus on industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud platforms like Azure. Their expertise in web/mobile development and scripting does not align with the core responsibilities of designing high-performance, scalable C++ systems for automation machinery.
strengths: Strong background in software development with multiple languages and paradigms
Experience in real-time systems and low-latency applications (Dlang, Asynchronous I/O)
Proven ability to mentor teams and implement agile practices (TDD, CI/CD, Pairing)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant role was in 2015)
No evidence of industrial automation, cybersecurity (IEC 62443), or cloud platform (Azure) expertise
Lacks direct experience with message brokers, REST/MQTT for IoT, or multi-threaded C++ systems
